title: Extract Finance period calculations
description: Extract only periodRange(), prorate(), inRange(), clampRangeToToday(), and prorateElapsed() from assets/app.js into app/Modules/Finance/Frontend/finance-period-calculation.js as the canonical source. Publish a byte-identical copy at assets/finance-period-calculation.js and load it as a classic script after the existing Finance calculation assets and before assets/app.js, without introducing a bundler or build step. Preserve global function names and signatures, local Date behavior, Sunday-based week boundaries, inclusive date comparisons, monthly-value divisors, annual elapsed-month behavior, input coercion, returned object shapes, script ordering, deployment behavior, and all public contracts. Existing helper dependencies startOfWeek(), addDays(), and dnum() remain in assets/app.js and resolve at call time. Keep periodLabel(), navigation state, bucketPeriodTotals(), expense occurrence calculations, annual IR calculations, projections, charts, rendering/UI, DOM access, persistence, OFX handling, backend behavior, and date-rule improvements outside this phase. Add focused characterization coverage for day, week, month, and year ranges; leap-year and year-boundary behavior; inclusive range checks; day, week, month, and year prorating; current-month clamping; elapsed annual prorating; unchanged ranges; invalid/unknown period fallbacks currently observable; and deterministic byte-for-byte canonical-source/public-asset equality.
jsTests: powershell.exe -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$sourceHash = (Get-FileHash app/Modules/Finance/Frontend/finance-period-calculation.js -Algorithm SHA256).Hash; $assetHash = (Get-FileHash assets/finance-period-calculation.js -Algorithm SHA256).Hash; if ($sourceHash -ne $assetHash) { throw 'Frontend source and public asset differ.' }"
